title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 332.111 - Unregistered or unlicensed practice, penalty
text:
332.111.  Unregistered or unlicensed practice, penalty. — Any person who practices dentistry as defined in section 332.071, or as a dental hygienist as defined in section 332.091, who is not duly registered and currently licensed in Missouri as hereinafter provided is guilty of a class A misdemeanor.
(L. 1969 S.B. 97, A.L. 1981 S.B. 16, A.L. 2004 S.B. 1122)
